PodPal

You've got 10 minutes.
Make them count.

PodPal runs in the background while you record. No extra effort, no switching tabs.

🔍

Live research, as you talk

PodPal picks up topics from your conversation and surfaces relevant facts and context in real time - right when you need them.

💬

Follow-up questions on demand

Hit one button and get a sharp, specific question based on what your guest just said. Never lose the thread.

📋

Summary and social posts when you stop

When you end the session, PodPal generates episode highlights, show notes, and three ready-to-post social captions.

🎙 Your 10-minute trial begins when you open the app No recording starts until you hit "Start Listening"
Start my trial → Upgrade - $19/mo

No card needed for your trial. Upgrade anytime.
